case_title: PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P. VS. DAVID K. HARRIS ET AL

ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND RECALL WRIT (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P. JUDGMENT OF DEC-20-2016 SET ASIDE
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID K.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID K.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID K. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID K. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1278 BUCHANAN STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94115, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FOR EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P. SERVED DEC-06-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID K.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID K. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID K. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FOR EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P.
FEE PAID ON: STIPULATION & ORDER (PAYMENT SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF BUT HAD TO COLLECT 1ST APPEARANCE FEE FOR DEFENDANT) FILED BY DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID K.
WRIT ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY ON DEC-22-16 RETURNED UNSATISFIED
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID K.
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID K. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, DAVID K. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1278 BUCHANAN STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $5,696.16 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,696.16, LEASE FORFEITED, (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES AND FOR MONEY DAMAGES FOR DETAILS)

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER
